title: Payment method, client, electronic device, storage medium, and server
abstract: Embodiments of this application disclose a payment method, a client, an electronic device, a storage medium, and a server. The method includes: receiving a payment instruction of a user; generating, according to audio information in a voice input of the user, a voice feature vector of the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector; and when the matching succeeds, sending personal information associated with the user feature vector to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. The method can bring convenience to shopping by a consumer.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A payment method, wherein the method comprises: receiving a payment instruction of a user; generating, according to audio information in a voice input of the user, a voice feature vector of the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector; and when the matching succeeds, sending personal information associated with the user feature vector to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 2. The method according to claim 1, wherein before the receiving a payment instruction of a user, the method further comprises: obtaining by identification an enabling instruction from the audio information in the voice input of the user. 3. The method according to claim 1, wherein the method further comprises: obtaining payment object information; and in the sending step, when the matching succeeds, sending the payment obj ect information and the personal information associated with the user feature vector to the server, so that the server performs a payment operation for the payment object information according to the resource account associated with the personal information. 4. The method according to claim 3, wherein the step of obtaining payment object information comprises: generating the audio information according to the voice input of the user; performing voice recognition on the audio information, to obtain payment obj ect description information; and determining the payment object information according to the payment object description information. 5. The method according to claim 4, wherein the step of determining the payment object information comprises: sending the payment object description information to the server; 

 receiving at least one piece of payment object information fed back by the server; feeding back the at least one piece of payment object information to the user; and receiving a confirmation instruction of the user, and using payment object information pointed to by the confirmation instruction, as the determined payment object information. 6. The method according to claim 4, wherein the step of determining the payment object information comprises: querying a locally stored object information set according to the payment object description information, to obtain at least one piece of payment object information; feeding back the at least one piece of payment object information to the user; and receiving a confirmation instruction of the user, and using payment object information pointed to by the confirmation instruction, as the determined payment object information. 7. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the step of generating a voice feature vector comprises: generating a feature matrix according to the audio information; and performing dimension reduction processing on the feature matrix according to multiple feature dimensions, to obtain multiple dimension values used to represent feature dimensions, wherein the multiple dimension values form the voice feature vector. 8. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the step of generating a voice feature vector comprises at least one of the following: selecting any piece of audio information of the user, to generate the voice feature vector; or obtaining audio information that is in the voice input of the user and that comprises a user-defined payment keyword, and generating the voice feature vector according to the audio information; or providing specified information to the user, generating audio information according to a voice input that is made by the user based on the specified information, and generating the voice feature vector according to the audio information. 9. The method according to claim 8, wherein the specified information is requesting the user to make a specified sound; and the sending step further comprises: 

 performing voice recognition on the audio information used to generate the voice feature vector, to determine whether a user voice conforms to the specified information; and if yes, sending the payment object information and the personal information associated with the user feature vector to the server. 10. A client, comprising: a receiving module, configured to receive a payment instruction of a user; a generation module, configured to generate, according to audio information in a voice input of the user, a voice feature vector of the audio information; a matching module, configured to perform matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector; and a sending module, configured to: when the matching succeeds, send personal information associated with the user feature vector to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 11. A computer storage medium, storing program instructions, wherein when the program instructions are executed by a processor, the following operations are performed: receiving a payment instruction of a user for payment object information; generating, according to audio information in a voice input of the user, a voice feature vector of the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector; and when the matching succeeds, sending the payment object information and personal information associated with the user feature vector to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 12. A payment method, wherein the method comprises: receiving a payment instruction of a user; and sending at least one of audio information in a voice input of the user, a feature matrix generated according to the audio information, or a voice feature vector generated according to the audio information to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 13. The method according to claim 12, wherein before the receiving a payment instruction of a user, the method further comprises: obtaining by identification an enabling instruction from the audio information in the voice input of the user. 14. The method according to claim 12, wherein the method further comprises: obtaining payment object information; and in the sending step, sending the payment object information and at least one of the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector to the server, so that the server determines the personal information of the user according to the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector, and performs a payment operation for the payment object information according to the resource account associated with the personal information. 15. The method according to claim 14, wherein the step of obtaining payment object information comprises: generating the audio information according to the voice input of the user; performing voice recognition on the audio information, to obtain payment obj ect description information; and determining the payment object information according to the payment object description information. 16. The method according to claim 15, wherein the step of determining the payment obj ect information comprises: sending the payment object description information to the server; receiving at least one piece of payment object information fed back by the server; feeding back the at least one piece of payment object information to the user; and receiving a confirmation instruction of the user, and using payment object information pointed to by the confirmation instruction, as the determined payment object information. 17. The method according to claim 15, wherein the step of determining the payment obj ect information comprises: performing matching between the payment object description information and a locally stored object information set, to obtain at least one piece of payment object information; 

 feeding back the at least one piece of payment object information to the user; and receiving a confirmation instruction of the user, and using payment object information pointed to by the confirmation instruction, as the determined payment object information. 18. The method according to claim 12, wherein the voice feature vector is generated by: generating a feature matrix according to the audio information; and performing dimension reduction processing on the feature matrix according to multiple feature dimensions, to obtain multiple dimension values used to represent feature dimensions, wherein the multiple dimension values form the voice feature vector. 19. The method according to claim 12, wherein the voice feature vector is generated by at least one of the following: for audio information, selecting any piece of audio information of the user, to generate the voice feature vector; or obtaining audio information that is in the voice input of the user and that comprises a user-defined payment keyword, and generating the voice feature vector according to the audio information; or providing specified information to the user, generating audio information according to a voice input that is made by the user based on the specified information, and generating the voice feature vector according to the audio information. 20. The method according to claim 19, wherein the specified information is requesting the user to make a specified sound; and the sending step further comprises: performing voice recognition on the audio information used to generate the voice feature vector, to determine whether a user voice conforms to the specified information; and if yes, sending the payment object information and at least one of the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector to the server. 21. A client, comprising: a receiving module, configured to receive a payment instruction of a user; a sending module, configured to send at least one of audio information in a voice input of the user, a feature matrix generated according to the audio information, or a voice feature vector generated according to the audio information to a server, so that the server determines 

 personal information of the user according to the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 22. A computer storage medium, wherein the computer storage medium stores computer program instructions, and when the computer program instructions are executed by a processor, the following operations are performed: receiving a payment instruction of a user; and sending at least one of audio information in a voice input of the user, a feature matrix generated according to the audio information, or a voice feature vector generated according to the audio information to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the audio information, the feature matrix, or the voice feature vector, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 23. A payment method, applied to a server, wherein the method comprises: receiving audio information and payment object information that are sent by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; generating a voice feature vector according to the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 24. The method according to claim 23, wherein the step of generating a voice feature vector comprises: generating a feature matrix according to the audio information; and performing dimension reduction processing on the feature matrix according to multiple feature dimensions, to obtain multiple dimension values used to represent feature dimensions, wherein the multiple dimension values form the voice feature vector. 25. The method according to claim 23, wherein the step of receiving audio information comprises: providing specified information to the client, so that the client generates audio information according to a voice input that is made by the user based on the specified 

 information; and receiving the audio information fed back by the client. 26. The method according to claim 25, wherein the specified information is requesting the user to make a specified sound; and the step of performing a payment operation further comprises: performing voice recognition on the audio information used to generate the voice feature vector, to determine whether a user voice conforms to the specified information; and if yes, performing the payment operation for the payment object information according to the resource account in the personal information associated with the target feature vector. 27. A server, comprising: a receiving module, configured to receive audio information and payment object information that are sent by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; a generation module, configured to generate a voice feature vector according to the audio information; a matching module, configured to perform matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and a processing module, configured to perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 28. An electronic device, comprising a network communication unit, a memory, and a processor, wherein the network communication unit is configured to receive audio information and payment object information that are sent by a client, wherein the audio information is a recorded user voice; the memory is configured to store a user feature vector, wherein the user feature vector is associated with personal information; and the processor is configured to: generate a voice feature vector according to the audio 

 information; perform matching between the voice feature vector and the user feature vector in the memory, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 29. A computer storage medium, wherein the computer storage medium stores computer program instructions, and when the computer program instructions are executed by a processor, the following operations are performed: receiving audio information and payment obj ect information that are sent by a client, wherein the audio information is a recorded user voice; generating a voice feature vector according to the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 30. A payment method, comprising: receiving a voice feature vector and payment object information from a client, wherein the voice feature vector is generated according to audio information in a voice input of a user; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 31. The method according to claim 30, wherein the step of receiving a voice feature vector comprises: providing specified information to the client, so that the client records audio information in a voice that is made by the user based on the specified information; and receiving a voice feature vector that is generated according to the audio information and that is fed back by the client. 32. A server, comprising: a receiving module, configured to receive a voice feature vector and payment object 

 information that are sent by a client, wherein the voice feature vector is generated according to audio information in a voice input of a user; a matching module, configured to perform matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and a processing module, configured to perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 33. An electronic device, comprising a network communication unit, a memory, and a processor, wherein the network communication unit is configured to receive a voice feature vector and payment object information that are sent by a client, wherein the voice feature vector is generated according to audio information in a voice input of a user; the memory is configured to store a user feature vector, wherein the user feature vector is associated with personal information; and the processor is configured to: perform matching between the voice feature vector and the user feature vector in the memory, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 34. A computer storage medium, wherein the computer storage medium stores computer program instructions, and when the computer program instructions are executed by a processor, the following operations are performed: receiving a voice feature vector and payment object information that are sent by a client, wherein the voice feature vector is generated according to audio information in a voice input of a user; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 35. A payment method, wherein the method comprises: generating audio information according to a voice input of a user; and 

 sending the audio information to a server, so that the server identifies payment object information expressed in the audio information, and determines personal information of the user according to the audio information, to perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account associated with the personal information. 36. A payment method, applied to a server, wherein the server receives audio information provided by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; and the method comprises: determining payment object information according to the audio information, and generating a voice feature vector according to the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target user feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 37. The method according to claim 36, wherein before the determining payment object information, the method further comprises: obtaining by identification an enabling instruction from the audio information in the voice input of the user. 38. The method according to claim 36, wherein the step of determining payment object information comprises: performing voice recognition on the audio information, to obtain payment obj ect description information; and determining the corresponding payment obj ect information according to the payment object description information. 39. The method according to claim 38, wherein the step of determining payment object information comprises: querying a stored object information set according to the payment object description information, to obtain at least one piece of payment object information; feeding back the at least one piece of payment object information to the client, to provide the payment object information to the user; and receiving a confirmation instruction of the user that is sent by the client, and using 

 payment obj ect information pointed to by the confirmation instruction, as the determined payment object information. 40. The method according to claim 36, wherein the step of generating a voice feature vector comprises: generating a feature matrix according to the audio information; and performing dimension reduction processing on the feature matrix according to multiple feature dimensions, to obtain multiple dimension values used to represent feature dimensions, wherein the multiple dimension values form the voice feature vector. 41. The method according to claim 36, wherein the step of generating a voice feature vector comprises: sending specified information to the client, to provide the specified information to the user; receiving audio information fed back by the client, wherein the audio information is generated by recording a voice that is made by the user based on the specified information; and generating the voice feature vector according to the audio information. 42. The method according to claim 41, wherein the specified information is requesting the user to make a specified sound; and the step of performing a payment operation further comprises: performing voice recognition on the audio information used to generate the voice feature vector, to determine whether a user voice conforms to the specified information; and if yes, performing the payment operation for the payment object information according to the resource account in the personal information associated with the target feature vector. 43. A server, wherein the server comprises: a receiving module, configured to receive audio information sent by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; a determining module, configured to determine payment object information according to the audio information; a generation module, configured to generate a voice feature vector according to the 

 audio information; a matching module, configured to perform matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in the server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target user feature vector; and a processing module, configured to perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 44. An electronic device, comprising a network communication unit, a memory, and a processor, wherein the network communication unit is configured to receive audio information provided by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; the memory is configured to store a user feature vector, wherein the user feature vector is associated with personal information; and the processor is configured to: determine payment object information according to the audio information, and generate a voice feature vector according to the audio information; perform matching between the voice feature vector and the user feature vector in the memory, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target user feature vector; and perform a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 45. A computer storage medium, wherein the computer storage medium stores computer program instructions, and when the computer program instructions are executed by a processor, the following operations are performed: receiving audio information provided by a client, wherein the audio information is generated according to a voice input of a user; determining payment object information according to the audio information, and generating a voice feature vector according to the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature vector and a user feature vector in a server, wherein a user feature vector that successfully matches the voice feature vector is a target user feature vector; and performing a payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in personal information associated with the target feature vector. 46. A payment method, wherein the method comprises: 

 displaying a first interface comprising payment object information; receiving a payment request of a user, wherein the payment request indicates that the user expects to perform a payment operation for the payment object information; displaying a second interface comprising specified information; and generating audio information according to a voice input that is made by the user based on the specified information, to determine personal information of the user according to the audio information, so as to perform the payment operation for the payment object information according to a resource account in the personal information. 47. An electronic device, comprising a microphone unit and a network communication unit, wherein the microphone unit is configured to generate audio information according to a voice input of a user; and the network communication unit is configured to send the audio information to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the audio information, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 48. An electronic device, comprising a microphone unit, a network communication unit, and a processor, wherein the microphone unit is configured to generate audio information according to a voice input of a user; the processor is configured to generate a feature matrix according to the audio information, wherein the feature matrix is used to represent the audio information; and the network communication unit is configured to send the feature matrix to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the feature matrix, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 49. An electronic device, comprising a microphone unit, a network communication unit, and a processor, wherein the microphone unit is configured to generate audio information according to a voice input of a user; 

 the processor is configured to: generate a feature matrix according to the audio information, wherein the feature matrix is used to represent the audio information; and perform endpoint detection processing on the feature matrix, to reduce data in a non-voice part; and the network communication unit is configured to send the processed feature matrix to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the feature matrix, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 50. An electronic device, comprising a microphone unit, a network communication unit, and a processor, wherein the microphone unit is configured to generate audio information according to a voice input of a user; the processor is configured to generate a feature matrix according to the audio information; and generate a voice feature vector according to the feature matrix, wherein the voice feature vector is used to represent the audio information; and the network communication unit is configured to send the voice feature vector to a server, so that the server determines personal information of the user according to the voice feature vector, to perform a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 51. An electronic device, comprising a microphone unit, a network communication unit, and a processor, wherein the microphone unit is configured to generate audio information according to a voice input of a user; the processor is configured to: generate a feature matrix according to the audio information; generate a voice feature vector according to the feature matrix, wherein the voice feature vector is used to represent the audio information; and perform matching between the voice feature vector and a stored user feature vector, to obtain a target feature vector matching the voice feature vector; and the network communication unit is configured to send personal information associated with the target feature vector to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 52. A payment method, wherein the method comprises: receiving a payment instruction of a user; generating, according to audio information in a voice input of the user, a voice feature of the audio information; performing matching between the voice feature and a user feature; and when the matching succeeds, sending personal information associated with the user feature to a server, so that the server performs a payment operation for a resource account associated with the personal information. 53. The method according to claim 52, wherein the step of generating a voice feature comprises at least one of the following: selecting any piece of audio information of the user, to generate the voice feature; or obtaining audio information that is in the voice input of the user and that comprises a user-defined payment keyword, and generating the voice feature according to the audio information; or providing specified information to the user, generating audio information according to a voice input that is made by the user based on the specified information, generating the voice feature according to the audio information. 54. The method according to claim 53, wherein the specified information is requesting the user to make a specified sound; and the sending step further comprises: performing voice recognition on the audio information used to generate the voice feature, to determine whether a user voice conforms to the specified information; and if yes, sending the payment object information and the personal information associated with the user feature vector to the server.
